leadText: Torrent (Japanese: げきりゅう Raging Rapids) is an Ability introduced in Generation III. All Water-type first partner Pokémon have this Ability.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations III and IV 1.1.2 Generations V onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III and IV [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Torrent uses a Water-type move , the move's power will be increased by 50% if the user has less than or equal to ⅓ of its maximum HP remaining. Generations V onward [ edit | edit source ] Instead of boosting Water-type moves' power, Torrent now technically boosts the Pokémon's Attack or Special Attack by 50% during damage calculation if a Water-type move is being used, resulting in effectively the same effect. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Torrent has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III and IV [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Torrent uses a Water-type move , the move's power will be increased by 50% if the user has less than or equal to ⅓ of its maximum HP remaining. Generations V onward [ edit | edit source ] Instead of boosting Water-type moves' power, Torrent now technically boosts the Pokémon's Attack or Special Attack by 50% during damage calculation if a Water-type move is being used, resulting in effectively the same effect.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts the power of Water-type moves when HP is low. MD T D S Boosts the power of the Pokémon's Water-type moves when its HP is low. B S L ＨＰがへって ピンチになると みずタイプの わざが つよくなる Conq. Raises Attack when HP is low. MD GtI When the Pokémon's HP is low, the power of its Water-type moves goes up. * When the Pokémon's HP is low, the power of Water-type moves goes up! * S MD When the Pokémon's HP is low, the power of Water-type moves goes up! MD RT DX When the Pokémon's HP is low, the power of Water-type moves goes up.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Torrent is the only variation of the Overgrow Ability that none of Ash's Pokémon have activated in Pokémon the Series . It is also the only variation of Overgrow that has not been activated by a main character's Pokémon.
